# Claim Review Template

## Scope
What page, section, or claim surface is being reviewed?

## Evidence Used
List benchmark outputs, audits, runtime checks, or docs used.

## Valid Claims
List claims the current evidence supports.

## Unsupported Or Premature Claims
List wording the site should not use yet.

## Risks And Caveats
List ambiguity, yellow tracks, null results, or known limitations.

## Recommendation
Should the copy be accepted, softened, or reworked?
